title: Spindle-Hearts
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: In a city where machinery runs on stolen fairy souls, a clockmaker's apprentice discovers she can hear the trapped spinners singing and must choose between the safety of her guild and freeing them.
long_description: In a city where machinery runs on stolen fairy souls, a clockmaker's apprentice discovers she can hear the trapped spinners singing and must choose between the safety of her guild and freeing them.
